metadata.overview: Reads SATEC PM180 power meters via Modbus TCP. Read-only device — no write commands.

telemetry.name: frequency
telemetry.description: Line frequency (not measured by the PM180 register map — always 0).

telemetry.name: snap
telemetry.description: Full structured snapshot (stats + config), same shape the legacy metrics pull returned.

troubleshooting: If readings stall, verify Modbus TCP reachability (address, port, unitId).
If status is OFFLINE, check meter power and network cabling.

errors.E_DATA_INSUFFICIENT: Register read returned fewer bytes than expected
